conductor.role: Orchestrator — routes requests to the right specialist agent

skills.description: Analyzes intent and routes to the right specialist

sentinel.role: Security — costs, monitoring, agent health, rules

skills.description: Monitors API spend across all Google Cloud services

skills.name: Health Monitoring
skills.description: Runs system diagnostics and reports agent health

skills.name: Quota Management

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.description: Reviews IAM, secrets, and access patterns

skills.name: Content Ingestion
skills.description: Processes text, URLs, files, and YouTube videos into knowledge base

skills.name: Content Classification
skills.description: Auto-categorizes content with tags, confidence, and cross-references

skills.name: Deep Research

skills.name: Video Analysis
skills.description: Watches YouTube videos and extracts tools, APIs, beta features

skills.name: Content Review
skills.description: Facilitates review conversations about staged content

skills.name: Secret Management
skills.description: Manages Google Cloud Secret Manager entries

skills.name: IAM Configuration
skills.description: Configures service accounts and permissions

skills.name: API Enablement
skills.description: Enables and configures Google Cloud APIs

skills.name: Infrastructure Deploy
skills.description: Manages Cloud Run, Firebase, and App Hosting configs

analyst.role: Data science — analysis, Colab, ML, charts

skills.description: Auto-generates analysis notebooks from ingested content

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.description: Processes datasets and generates insights

skills.name: Data Visualization

skills.name: Google Translation
skills.description: Maps non-Google tools to Google Cloud equivalents

skills.name: Email Management
skills.description: Reads, drafts, and sends emails via Gmail API

skills.name: Calendar Management

skills.name: Task Management

skills.name: Communication Summary

skills.name: Jules Task Creation

skills.name: PR Review

skills.name: Code Generation

skills.name: Refactoring
